name: Docs Shell
description: Purpose-built documentation layout with sidebar navigation, main content area, optional right-side TOC, and mobile hamburger menu. Designed for prompt-first documentation sites.

slots.sidebar: Left sidebar (260px) with accordion navigation and search trigger
slots.content: Main scrollable content area with max-width constraint
slots.toc: Optional right-side table of contents (200px, sticky)
slots.mobile-bar: Mobile hamburger menu bar below fixed header
